vocab.search: Implement search using React 19 use() hook for async data fetching. Client-side filtering: useDeferredValue + useMemo for large lists. Server-side: pass search params as props from server components.
vocab.loading: Use Suspense boundaries with fallback UI. React 19 supports async components natively — await data in server components, wrap client data-dependent components in Suspense.
vocab.authentication: Use React context for auth state on the client. Persist session in httpOnly cookies set by server. Do not store tokens in localStorage.
vocab.forms: Use React 19 useActionState() and useFormStatus() for form state and pending state. Pair with server actions for zero-client-JS form submissions.
vocab.state: For local state: useState + useReducer. For server state: use() + Suspense. For shared state: React Context or Zustand (lightweight). Avoid Redux for new projects unless migrating.
